## What's changed

- Added Antigravity service-status monitoring through the official Google AI Studio status service.
- Refined the settings layout and copy for clearer navigation and provider information.
- Fixed neutral status icons using the wrong colour in the light theme.

This is a beta release. Stable-channel installations will ignore it, while Beta-channel installations can update normally in place; no migration or reinstall is required.

**Full changelog:** [v0.3.1...v0.4.0-beta.1](https://github.com/CallMeLewis/UsageDeck/compare/v0.3.1...v0.4.0-beta.1)
